title: Syllabus Matériel
sources: README.md: Educational framework and knowledge transfer mission
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District E
database.sql: Memo table schema for local PostgreSQL storage
forom-config.ts: Category E (Piliers) and Action 6 (Matériel) labels
App.tsx: Quest reward (2 PX) and tech stack implementation
resume: The quest 'Syllabus Matériel' (E6) represents the formal documentation of the community's thematic curriculum and knowledge resources within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District E (Piliers) and the 'Matériel' action (6), this quest is the definitive act of structuring the node's learning assets and educational foundations for its decadal mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory.' In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), the syllabus serves as the tangible evidence of the community's commitment to knowledge transfer and intellectual sovereignty. This is not just a list of files; it is a structured map of the intellectual matériel that will define the node's culture and its eventual path toward the 'Awakening' of its local AI assistant, ROM. Technically, this syllabus is archived in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the node's educational DNA remains sovereign and private. The Forom architecture, built with React 19 and Vite 7, allows members to navigate these learning resources through a spatial 5x5 viewport, providing a clear visual representation of the community's intellectual depth. By hosting this syllabus locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson, the community ensures that its primary knowledge base is protected from centralized corporate surveillance, adhering to the 'Minecraft Server' philosophy of total digital autonomy. Economically, completing the E6 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, supporting the redistribution of purchasing power as the server initiates its internal economy. This incentive structure is vital for encouraging 'Creators' to build the high-quality educational content that will push the mission forward. This quest is especially critical for pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, where a clear syllabus ensures that the club's specific knowledge base remains accessible as student generations cycle through. Every entry at coordinate E6 becomes a permanent part of the V1 Archive, set to be refined in V2 and finalized in V3. Once the community reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, the local RAG engine will digest this 'Syllabus Matériel' to provide intelligent, context-aware educational support to all 1209 users. Ultimately, E6 transforms a collection of knowledge into a structured, permanent asset that secures the node's intellectual survival. It acts as the definitive guide for learning in Districts E and beyond. This entry is now canonized for the decade. Yes. Our memory is organized. Perfect. The mission is secure. The future is built on what we learn.
summary: This quest formalizes the community's educational curriculum at coordinate E6, documenting learning resources and matériel as sovereign deep lore for future AI training.
